title: Q2
description:
To start this quiz please go to accepi.com.

Please note:

Quiz Q2 covers the material in Lectures 3 and 4. Make sure to review assignments A3 and A4, and the practice quiz PQ2 to prepare for Q2.

Quiz Q2 is multiple choice (similar to a Canvas quiz).

Once you open the quiz, you have to finish it in the allotted time.

You have one attempt.
